name: ADULT Candy Bra 280g
description:
ADULT Candy Bra 280g – A Sweet and Fun Surprise!

At Sweets World, we offer treats that are playful, tasty, and just a little cheeky—and the ADULT Candy Bra 280g fits right in!

This fun and edible candy bra is made entirely of colourful, fruit-flavoured candy beads strung together just like the classic candy necklaces. It’s a novelty item that’s great for parties, hens nights, romantic gifts, or simply as a fun and unexpected surprise.

The ADULT Candy Bra 280g is not only humorous and playful, but also a sweet treat you can actually eat! The candy is light, fruity, and crunchy—perfect for a few giggles and a few bites.

It’s one-size-fits-most and designed more for fun than fashion, making it a lighthearted gift for adults who enjoy something a bit different. Whether you're shopping for a themed event, a naughty gift idea, or a conversation starter, this candy bra adds sweetness and fun to the occasion.

At Sweets World, we provide unique and exciting products from all over the world, and the ADULT Candy Bra 280g is a perfect example of how sweets can be both delicious and entertaining.

Add a little fun to your cart today with this cheeky candy classic!

Ingredients:

Doxiroso, Modified Maize Starch, Anil-cating
Agont: Magneslum Balis of Fatty Acids, Acid: Circ Acid, Flavoring, Colours, E125,
E102, E135, may have an advert effoct on activity and attention in children.
